servicesSection.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions to automate and grow your business with cutting-edge technology

chatbots.title: Chatbots
chatbots.description: Customer support automation with seamless integration for Telegram, WhatsApp, and other platforms.

expanded.tagline: Your best employee — works 24/7 and never gets tired
expanded.pain: Imagine: 3 AM, a client wants to buy your product. Without a chatbot, that's a lost sale. With our bot — instant reply, captured lead, and in the morning you simply wake up to a new order.
expanded.solution: We build smart chatbots that know your business inside out: they answer questions, qualify leads, collect requests and process orders — fully automated, no human needed. Integrations with Telegram, WhatsApp, Instagram and your website.
benefits: Zero missed clients — the bot works even while you sleep
Save 60–80% of team time on repetitive support replies
Average +40% increase in lead-to-sale conversion in the first month
expanded.result: Average client results: −60% support tickets, +300% audience engagement.
expanded.cta: I want a chatbot — let's talk

ai.title: AI Assistants
ai.description: Smart business helpers with personalized solutions to streamline your operations.

expanded.tagline: Replace routine with intelligence — scale without hiring
expanded.pain: Your employees spend hours on routine: copying data, writing reports, answering the same questions. That's expensive, slow, and boring. They could be generating real revenue instead.
expanded.solution: We build personal AI assistants that know your business: your products, clients, and processes. They analyze data in real time, generate reports, answer employee questions and automate repetitive tasks.
benefits: Your team focuses on what matters — AI handles the routine
Decision-making speed increases 3–5x with instant analytics
Human errors become a thing of the past — AI doesn't get tired or make mistakes
expanded.result: Clients reduce operational costs by 30–50% and scale without hiring new staff.
expanded.cta: I want an AI assistant — let's talk

landing.title: Landing Pages
landing.description: High-conversion websites designed for maximum sales and promotion effectiveness.

expanded.tagline: A website that sells — not just looks pretty
expanded.pain: A beautiful website doesn't sell. A properly built funnel does. Most websites lose 80% of visitors because they don't give people what they need at the right moment.
expanded.solution: We create landing pages where every element — headline, button, trust block, testimonial — works toward one goal: turning a visitor into a client. Persuasion psychology, A/B testing, under-2-second load times, and a mobile version you'll be proud to show.
benefits: +150–250% conversion growth compared to a typical website
SEO optimization from day one — free organic traffic from search
Ready in 5–10 days, no drawn-out revisions
expanded.result: Average result: clients receive 2–3x more leads from the same traffic.
expanded.cta: I want a high-converting landing — let's talk

form.consentText: By submitting, I agree to the

sections.heading: 1. General provisions
sections.text: This Privacy Policy governs the collection, storage, use, and protection of personal data of users of steppedev.kz (hereinafter — the Site), operated by SteppeDev (hereinafter — the Operator).

sections.heading: 2. Data we collect
list: Browser and device technical data (cookies, IP address)

sections.heading: 3. Purposes of processing
list: Processing incoming requests and providing feedback
Improving quality of the Site and services

sections.heading: 4. Sharing data with third parties
sections.text: The Operator does not share personal data with third parties without the user's explicit consent, except as required by applicable law.

sections.heading: 5. Storage and protection
sections.text: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, modification, or destruction. Data is stored no longer than necessary to achieve the purposes of processing.

sections.heading: 6. User rights
list: Request access to your personal data
Submit a complaint to the supervisory authority

sections.heading: 7. Contact information
sections.text: For questions about personal data processing: steppedev@gmail.com

sections.heading: 1. General
sections.text: This document constitutes a public offer from SteppeDev (hereinafter — the Service Provider) and contains all material terms for the provision of services in chatbot development, AI assistants, and landing page creation.

sections.heading: 2. Acceptance
sections.text: Acceptance of this offer occurs upon submitting the contact form on the Site, or by the Client sending a message via messenger or email describing the project.

sections.heading: 3. Subject matter
sections.text: The Service Provider agrees to develop and/or configure software (chatbots, AI assistants, websites), and the Client agrees to accept and pay for these services under the agreed terms.

sections.heading: 4. Pricing and payment
sections.text: The cost of services is determined individually based on the Client's technical requirements and agreed upon before work begins. Payment is made as specified in the invoice or contract.

sections.heading: 5. Delivery timeline
sections.text: Timelines for each project are agreed individually after reviewing the technical specification. The Service Provider commits to meeting agreed deadlines and will notify the Client in advance of any potential delays.

sections.heading: 6. Warranty
sections.text: The Service Provider offers a 30-day warranty from the date of project delivery. Any identified bugs are fixed free of charge during this period.

sections.heading: 7. Liability
sections.text: Both parties bear liability in accordance with applicable law. The Service Provider is not liable for Client losses arising from the submission of inaccurate information.
By submitting the form on this website, I, as the data subject, freely and knowingly give my consent to SteppeDev (the Operator) to process the following personal data:

sections.heading: Purposes of processing:
list: Processing my request and providing a response

sections.heading: Processing terms:
sections.text: Processing begins upon form submission and continues until the stated purposes are achieved or until this consent is withdrawn. Consent may be withdrawn at any time by sending a request to steppedev@gmail.com.
I confirm that I have read the Privacy Policy and hereby give my consent to the processing of the above personal data.
